name: Cherry Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1 No. 2 can (2 1/2 cups) tart red cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pitted cherries and add enough water to the cherry liquid to make 1 cup.
2. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a bowl.
3. Slowly stir in the cherry liquid mixture.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
5. Add almond extract and red food coloring.
6. Cool mixture to lukewarm.
7. Spoon cherries into tart shells and pour the cornstarch mixture over each tart.
8. Chill the tarts.
9. Trim tops with baked pastry star cutouts.
10. Roll pastry dough to 1/8 inch thickness, cut into rounds, and fit over star molds.
11. Trim edges, prick as shown, place on a cookie sheet, and bake in a very hot oven (450°F) for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Cool the shells.
13. Spoon cherry filling into the cooled tart shells.
14. Frost with confectioners' sugar mixture until pourable consistency.
